name: Punchbowl Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake according to the box instructions. Allow it to cool completely.
2. Crumble the cooled cake into a large punch bowl.
3. In one layer of the crumbled cake, add half of the instant vanilla pudding, half of the cherry pie filling, half of the crushed pineapple, 1 banana, and 1 (8 oz.) Cool Whip.
4. Add coconut and pecans on top, reserving some for garnish.
5. Repeat with the remaining layers: half of the cherry pie filling, half of the crushed pineapple, another banana, and the remaining Cool Whip.
6. Refrigerate until serving.
7. Serve in punch bowls, allowing each guest to enjoy their own creation.
